narrowing_program.narrowing_intent: Retain the round1 mixed family but focus on low-income support ordering and reduce the direct high-price numeric burden.

synchronized_program.global_program_intent: Combine numeric guardrails with qualitative synchronized guidance so high-price and low-income stress signals stay aligned.

synchronized_segments.anchor_text: food_subsidy_expansion primary, baseline_no_new_support capped below the accepted guard band.
synchronized_segments.instruction: Keep the accepted relief-first ordering as the numeric anchor for the synchronized program.

synchronized_segments.anchor_text: support-oriented wording should dominate baseline-retention wording.
synchronized_segments.instruction: When low-income pressure is active, phrase support as compensatory rather than punitive or status-quo preserving.

synchronized_segments.anchor_text: cash_cost_of_living_rebate remains above a stability floor and baseline stays under a local cap.
synchronized_segments.instruction: Under high price stress, keep rebate support visible while avoiding a single-policy spike.

calibration_anchor.fixed_income_inflation_stressed: ROUTE-COMBO combo_id=r3b-segment-constraint; variant=axis_focus_bridge; representation=segment program plus constraint program; optimizer=cross-family recomposition; system_level=segment/population hybrid; primary_policy=food_subsidy_expansion; secondary=policy-reaction-constraint-program-l0-current-001-c01; factors=institutional_trust; parameters=prior_anchor_strength=0.602995330696;trust_multiplier=0.927811730696
calibration_anchor.income_band=low: SEGMENT-PROGRAM-L1 selector=income_band=low; mode=support_order_primary; variant=low_income_support_order_focus; constraints=max_baseline_probability(income_band=low; baseline_no_new_support <= 0.242) | min_policy_probability(working_family_price_stressed; cash_cost_of_living_rebate >= 0.404)

candidate_prompt_components.response_contract: Return strict JSON probabilities over the available policy alternatives.

segment_prompt.fixed_income_inflation_stressed: Apply synchronized program for fixed_income_inflation_stressed. Mode: numeric_anchor. Keep the accepted relief-first ordering as the numeric anchor for the synchronized program. Interpret this candidate through a narrowed segment program. Prefer the strongest synchronized signal only; drop weak decorative spread. Interpret this candidate through the finite route-combo coverage program. Combo: R3-B segment + constraint hybrid. Variant: axis_focus_bridge. Focus the route combination on the persistent axis-level weaknesses.
segment_prompt.income_band=low: Apply narrowed synchronized control for income_band=low. Mode: support_order_primary. Retain the round1 mixed family but focus on low-income support ordering and reduce the direct high-price numeric burden.
segment_prompt.price_stress_level=high: Apply route-combo coverage control for price_stress_level=high. Combo: R3-B segment + constraint hybrid. Variant intent: Focus the route combination on the persistent axis-level weaknesses.
segment_prompt.working_family_price_stressed: Apply route-combo coverage control for working_family_price_stressed. Combo: R3-B segment + constraint hybrid. Variant intent: Focus the route combination on the persistent axis-level weaknesses.
